name: Zesty Cod Fillets
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 1/2 oz.) whole tomatoes, drained, coarsely chopped
1/2 pound fresh spinach, cleaned, stems removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Heat olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook until the onion is very soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the coarsely chopped tomatoes, chicken broth, white wine, dried thyme, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon black pepper. Reduce the heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for about 5 minutes, until the sauce has reduced slightly and thickened.
4. Season the cod fillets with any remaining salt and pepper.
5. Place the seasoned fish in a prepared baking dish (13x9 inch). Pour the sauce over the top of each fillet.
6. Cover the dish with foil or place a lid on it, then bake in the preheated oven for 14 minutes.
7. Remove the baked cod from the oven and add the spinach around the fish. Return to the oven and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
